title: Cross-link to PDX/model index (ewing-pdx-model-index)
context: Where a model relates to a PDX/model in the sibling ewing-pdx-model-index project, the catalog should cross-link to it (a reference, not a recomputation), helping researchers move between in-vitro and in-vivo models. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Cross-link catalogued models to related entries in ewing-pdx-model-index (reference only, no recompute).
acceptanceCriteria: For each catalogued model with a related PDX/model entry in ewing-pdx-model-index, a provenanced cross-link (not a copy) is recorded.
No PDX data is recomputed or re-hosted; only references/links are stored.
Cross-links validate in CI; deliverable dataset licensed CC-BY-4.0.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
